title: urera repens
intro: Urera repens, also known as the nettle tree or ivy tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Urera repens is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
